title: Peace Symbol: Copy & Paste ☮ Peace Sign & Dove Characters
meta_description: Copy and paste the peace symbol (☮) plus peace-sign gestures, doves, olive branches, and harmony characters. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The peace sign (☮) and the doves, hand gestures, and nature symbols that share its meaning. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The peace symbol has stood for anti-war movements and harmony since the 1950s. This library brings together the peace sign itself, the victory and hand gestures associated with it, the dove and olive-branch imagery of peace, and the heart and handshake symbols of goodwill — all ready to copy into bios, posts, and messages.

sections.label: Peace Signs
sections.intro: The peace symbol and the hand gestures used to signal peace.

sections.label: Doves
sections.intro: The dove and olive branch are long-standing emblems of peace.

sections.label: Goodwill
sections.intro: Hearts, hands, and handshake symbols expressing peace and goodwill.
